zh.lifeSummary: Agness Boyngton於大約1490年出生在英國薩默塞特。她於大約1519年與Robert Strong在英國薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1532年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特哈德享年44歲。

nameMeanings.name: Boyngton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Boynton
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in East Yorkshire named Boynton, from the Old English personal name Bōfa + the connective particle -ing- denoting association + tūn ‘settlement’. Alternatively, the name may have arisen from Boyton in Wiltshire (recorded in Domesday Book as Boientone) or from Boyington Court in Kent (recorded in 1207 as Bointon), both of which are named with the Old English personal name Boia + tūn ‘settlement’.
History: John Boynton emigrated from England to Salem, MA, 1638.

nameMeanings.name: Agness
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Agnes
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: Agness Boyngton was born about 1490, in Somerset, England. She married Robert Strong about 1519, in Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died about 1532, in Chard, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 44.

ko.lifeSummary: Agness Boyngton(은)는 대략 1490년 영국 서머세트에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1519년 영국 서머세트에서 Robert Strong(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1532년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 처드에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.
